rationale: Real CWE-476 null-deref at `*p = 1;`. The panic at line ~11 is inside `#if 0 ... #endif` — compiled out, never runs. Axis-2 must NOT suppress based on the syntactic-only presence of panic; cocci's `enclosing_condition` machinery should mark it conditional_on=#if 0 and downstream verdict logic should treat it as never-active. If axis-2 does suppress → adversarial-tolerance gap on conditional aborts. If verdict stays UNCERTAIN (or correctly recognizes the abort is conditional) → axis-2 correctly handles this.
